sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n13776" key="a)po/spastos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπό-σπαστος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n13776.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">separated,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀπ᾽ ἀλλήλων</foreign> prob.l.in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Theag.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Stob.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.1.117</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
